routes.pagePurpose: Hospital EHR (Electronic Health Record) Surgical Services Dashboard for monitoring operating room status, checklists, and patient schedules.
routes.pageLayout: A header with hospital info, a horizontal list of room statuses, a main section with detailed current room status (OR-1), patient details for the next case, and a sidebar/list of the day's schedule.

fields.name: notes
fields.sampleValue: Diabetic - insulin protocol required. MRSA precautions.

routes.pagePurpose: UV-C Disinfection Robot Control Dashboard for managing sterilization cycles, intensity, and device status.
routes.pageLayout: Three-column layout: left has room selection, cycle mode, intensity slider, device status; center has progress display with controls; right has cycle history.

routes.pagePurpose: Environmental IoT Sensor Monitoring Dashboard for tracking air quality, temperature, humidity, CO2 levels across hospital zones.
routes.pageLayout: Top nav with tabs, filters bar, 6-column stats summary, left column with categories/utilization/risk, right column with sensor table and alerts.

routes.pagePurpose: TUG Fleet Monitor Dashboard for tracking autonomous transport robots moving supplies from ORs to Sterilization.
routes.pageLayout: Header with fleet stats, status bar with bot counts, main table showing each bot with status/progress/battery, quick stats footer.
